hero.subtitle: Welcome
hero.title: Modern Web Solutions for Your Business
hero.description: Take your business digital with our professional, fast and SEO-friendly website. We are here for you with our customer satisfaction-oriented service approach.

professional.title: Professional Service
professional.description: We provide the highest quality service with our experienced team.

support247.title: 24/7 Support
support247.description: We are always here when you need us. The easiest way to reach us.

reliable.title: Reliable
reliable.description: We work by prioritizing reliability and quality.

customerFocused.title: Customer Focused
customerFocused.description: Every customer is special to us. We create personalized solutions.

experiencedTeam.title: Experienced Team
experiencedTeam.description: We achieve the best results with our expert team.

qualityGuarantee.title: Quality Guarantee
qualityGuarantee.description: We guarantee quality in all our services.

faq.subtitle: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: We serve weekdays 09:00-18:00, Saturday 10:00-14:00. Closed on Sundays.
faq.q2: How can I make an appointment?
faq.a2: You can make an appointment by phone, WhatsApp or by filling out the contact form on our website.
faq.a3: We accept cash, credit card and bank transfer payments.
faq.a4: Yes, our first meeting and consultation service is free. Contact us for detailed information.

cta.title: Get in Touch Now
cta.description: Let's find the best solution for your business together. Call us now to take advantage of our special offers.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Who Are We?
about.description: With our team that has years of experience in the industry, we aim to provide the highest quality service to our customers and strive to do better every day. We make a difference with our professional approach and customer-oriented service understanding.
about.ctaDescription: Let us help you take your business to the next level.

services.subtitle: Our Services
services.title: What Do We Offer?
services.description: We offer comprehensive and professional solutions tailored to your business needs.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Professional consulting service tailored to your business.

services.ctaTitle: Get Detailed Information About Our Services
services.ctaDescription: Let's determine the most suitable service package for you together.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Reach Us
contact.description: You can contact us for your questions, suggestions or appointment requests.
